title: Rehemsa

'''Rehemsa''' was a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] celestial body located on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]]. Around [[3671 BBY]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Felix Iresso]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] at a [["Aven's Rest"|refugee camp]] at Rehemsa to [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] of the [[Great Galactic War]]. Four [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] later, the Human [[Botanist/Legends|botany researcher]] [[Chine Gabbard]] also [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from Rehemsa, where he was an executive at the company [[Rehemsa Consumables]].

==Description==
Rehemsa was a celestial body<ref name="GatORW" /> located in the [[Rehemsa system/Legends|Rehemsa system]]. It was a part of the [[Arrowhead]], or [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Rehemsa was situated between the [[Lolnar system/Legends|Lolnar]] and [[Sedratis system/Legends|Sedratis systems]] on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]],<ref name="TEA" /> specifically on its segment that also formed a part of the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as [[the Spin]]<ref name="Spin" /> between approximately [[17,000 BBY]] and [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]].<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==History==
[[File:FelixHS.png|thumb|right|220px|Felix Iresso was born at Rehemsa.]]
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] future [[Republic soldier|soldier]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Felix Iresso]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] around [[3671 BBY]] at a Rehemsa [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] camp known as [["Aven's Rest"]] to refugees of the [[Great Galactic War]], which was fought from [[3681 BBY]] to [[3653 BBY]] between the Republic and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]].<ref name="TORE" /> By the time of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="GatORW" /> which [[Declaration of a New Order|began]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the astronomical object shared its name with the agricultural corporation [[Rehemsa Consumables]]. During the Empire's existence, the Human [[Chine Gabbard]], who [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from Rehemsa, was an executive at the company and also worked as a [[Botanist/Legends|botany researcher]] at [[Garqi Agricultural University]], an establishment on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]].<ref name="GatORW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rehemsa was first mentioned in the [[2004]] [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''.<ref name="GatORW" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Rehemsa [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square M-11.<ref name="TEA" />
